songs.title: Blue Valentine
feed: “Blue Valentine” by NMIXX spends a 2nd week at #1 in the Personal Hot 100.
“Blue Valentine” by NMIXX is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 156 sales units.
“Blue Valentine” by NMIXX is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 370 streams units.
“Blue Valentine” by NMIXX is the #1 most airplayed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 20 airplay units.
“Blue Valentine” by NMIXX is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 547,029 total units.
